Homebrew Formulae

This is a listing of all casks available from the cask tap via the Homebrew package manager for macOS.

/api/cask.json (JSON API)

0-ad 0.28.0 Real-time strategy game 0 A.D.
010-editor 16.0.4 Text editor 010 Editor
115browser 36.0.0 Web browser 115Browser
1clipboard 0.1.8 Clipboard managing app 1Clipboard
1kc-razer 0.4.10 Open source colour effects manager for Razer devices Razer macOS
1password 8.12.24 Password manager that keeps all passwords secure behind one password 1Password
1password-cli 2.34.1 Command-line interface for 1Password 1Password CLI
1password-cli@1 1.12.9 Command-line helper for the 1Password password manager 1Password CLI
1password-cli@beta 2.36.0-beta.03 Command-line helper for the 1Password password manager 1Password CLI
1password@7 7.9.11 Password manager that keeps all passwords secure behind one password 1Password
1password@beta 8.12.26-31.BETA Password manager 1Password
1password@nightly latest Password manager 1Password Nightly
3dgenceslicer 3.5.1,4.0 Prepare files for 3D printing based on CAD models for 3DGence printers 3DGence Slicer
4k-image-compressor 1.5.0 Image compressor 4K Image Compressor
4k-slideshow-maker 2.0.1 Slideshow maker 4K Slideshow Maker
4k-stogram 4.9.0 Download Instagram photos, accounts, hashtags and locations 4K Stogram
4k-tokkit 25.4.2 Download TikTok videos and accounts 4K Tokkit
4k-video-downloader 4.33.5 Free video downloader 4K Video Downloader
4k-video-downloader+ 26.1.5 Free video downloader 4K Video Downloader Plus
4k-video-to-mp3 3.0.1 Convert any video to MP3 4K Video to MP3
4k-youtube-to-mp3 26.1.5 Turn YouTube links into MP3 files 4K YouTube to MP3
4peaks 1.8 Visualise and edit DNA sequence trace files 4Peaks
5ire 0.15.1 AI assistant and MCP client 5ire
5kplayer 6.11.0 Play 4K/1080p/360-degree video, MP3/AAC/APE/FLAC music without quality loss 5KPlayer
7777 1.2.1 Remote AWS database on local port 7777 7777
86box 6.0,9001 Emulator of x86-based machines based on PCem 86Box
8bitdo-firmware-updater 2.5.2 Firmware updater for 8BitDo controllers 8BitDo Firmware Updater
8bitdo-ultimate-software 2.0.6 Control every piece of your controller 8BitDo Ultimate Software
